message:
fix(mcp): resolve 2 test failures from stale assertions

- parse_caut_service_unknown: "google" and "anthropic" are now recognized
  slugs via is_google_slug/is_anthropic_slug — update test to expect Some()
  and add truly-unknown slug assertion
- mission_lifecycle_transitions_running: Running state has cancel/retry/
  complete/fail/block transitions but no pause — fix assertion to check
  for cancel instead of non-existent pause

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
